verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Down here below I'm not much at all, Down here below I really am quite small; But within me there lives Someone, Who made the earth, the moon and the sun.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh within me (oh within me), There lives Someone (there lives Someone), Said, "Let there be," and it was done. Oh, within me (oh within me), Though I am small (though I am small), There lives a King, the all in all.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If Satan tries to lay a trap for me, I do not fear for Jesus said to me, "Greater is He that is in thee, Than all the lies of the enemy.
